no_changes_rationale:
## What is done

The bead's implementation work is already merged on the base branch. Commit
`63e86ba1 refactor(agent): retire ExecuteBeadOptions and legacy ExecuteBead
[ddx-a8eaef0a]` removed both:

  - `type ExecuteBeadOptions` struct
  - the legacy `ExecuteBead` (non-`WithConfig`) method

Verification of AC item 1:

    $ rg 'type ExecuteBeadOptions ' cli/
    (no matches)

The remaining `ExecuteBeadOptions` mentions in the tree are only in source
comments (cli/cmd/agent_execute_bead_e2e_test.go, .../execute_bead_e2e_routing_test.go,
cli/internal/config/types.go, cli/internal/config/testconfig.go) referencing
the SD-024 migration history — the type itself is gone.

## What is blocking

AC items 2 and 3 (`go build ./...` / `go test ./...`) cannot be demonstrated
green in this pass for a reason unrelated to this bead's scope:

    cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go:326:28: cand.RecentSuccessRate undefined
        (type "github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent".RouteCandidateStatus has
         no field or method RecentSuccessRate)
    cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go:421:12: cand.RecentSuccessRate undefined

The same failure is present at the bead's declared base-rev
(`7bb075002d99bf66d84a860b4364c430ba637fa9`), so it predates the
ExecuteBeadOptions removal and is not caused by this work.

Root cause: the external `github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/agent` module renamed
`RouteCandidateStatus.RecentSuccessRate` → `ProviderReliabilityRate` (per
ADR-006 §5, in `/Users/erik/Projects/agent/service.go`). The local
`cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go` still references the old field name. This is
a separate routing-observability migration, outside the SD-024 cleanup scope
named by this bead's description ("Removes the legacy ExecuteBeadOptions
struct and the legacy ExecuteBead method").

Spot check that the affected packages alone are healthy:

    $ go build ./internal/agent/... ./internal/config/...
    (exit 0)

    $ go test ./internal/agent/ -run TestSynthesizeCommitMessage_InExecuteBead -count=1
    ok  	github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/agent	0.011s

So the SD-024-touched code is green; only the unrelated `cmd/agent_route_status.go`
breaks the whole-tree build/test commands the AC names.

## What a follow-up attempt would need

Either:

  (a) File and complete a separate bead that updates
      `cli/cmd/agent_route_status.go` to use
      `RouteCandidateStatus.ProviderReliabilityRate` (two call sites:
      lines 326 and 421), then re-queue this bead so its full-tree
      build/test commands can be demonstrated green; or

  (b) Relax this bead's AC to scope-limited build/test commands
      (`go build ./internal/agent/...` and
      `go test ./internal/agent/...`), since the legacy-code removal
      itself does not touch the broken package.

Committing a route-status fix from inside this bead would violate the
"Do not modify files outside the scope the bead description names"
constraint in the execute-bead instructions.
